item.title: Top 7 SketchUp Alternatives for 3D Modelling [Free & Paid] - Blog
item.description: Our hands-on guide to the best SketchUp alternatives for 3D printing, product CAD, and asset creation. Free and paid tools compared.

item.title: Unity vs Godot: Which is better for beginners? - Blog
item.description: Godot vs Unity: which engine wins for beginners in 2026? Compare licensing, scripting, assets & performance, and find out which one to start with today.
